title: Bungie lays off majority of Destiny 2 team and part of Marathon team after restructuring
summary: Sony and Bungie confirm a wave of mass layoffs that mainly affects the Destiny 2 team, as the company reorganizes and maintains its support for Marathon.

title: Microsoft raises prices of Xbox Series worldwide and discontinues the 2TB model
summary: The company increases the price of its Xbox Series X and S consoles in several countries, attributing it to the component crisis and increased costs of RAM and storage.

title: GTA 6 will not include a disc at launch, although a physical edition will arrive before the end of the year
summary: Rockstar confirms that the physical version of Grand Theft Auto VI will only contain a download code and that the physical disc might appear in December, generating industry debate.

title: Sony strengthens its guidelines against 'shovelware' and expels studios from PlayStation Store
summary: The company applies stricter rules to remove low-quality games from the PlayStation Store, leading to the removal of titles from certain developers.

title: GTA 6 is available for pre-order at $80 and reactions are swift
summary: Take-Two opens pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI at a base price of $80, sparking debate among players about the cost and launch editions.

title: Deltarune Chapter 5 is now available and players explore the festival
summary: The new chapter of Deltarune arrives accompanied by guides, analyses, and reports of a glitch on Switch, as the community discovers all its secrets.

title: Employees of Compulsion Games, studio behind South of Midnight, seek jobs ahead of impending layoffs at Xbox
summary: A wave of departures of developers from Compulsion Games anticipates the cuts at Xbox, while sources warn the layoffs could be used to settle scores.

title: Nintendo releases Star Fox remake for Switch 2 with multiple guides and additional content
summary: The return of Star Fox to Switch 2 includes a remake, amiibo compatibility, new voice actors, and a special event in Tetris 99.

title: Valve talks about the future of Steam Machine: it won't have as long a cycle as Steam Deck
summary: Those responsible for Steam Machine admit initial difficulties but confirm continued support, while the community debates its limited impact.

title: Steam Summer Sale 2026 begins with huge discounts on thousands of games
summary: Steam starts its traditional summer sale with deep discounts and a selection of the best titles on offer, according to reviews and recommendations.

title: Riot Games allows disabling Vanguard when not playing after user criticism
summary: The League of Legends anti-cheat can now run only when starting a game, responding to complaints about its intrusiveness and resource consumption.

title: Sonic ARG sparks controversy by asking permission to use player data for AI
summary: SEGA faces criticism for an alternative Sonic game that requests consent to train artificial intelligence with user data.

title: Apple raises prices of Mac and iPad due to component crisis
summary: The company attributes the historic price increases on its devices to the unprecedented rise in the cost of RAM and other components.

title: Guides to find all Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3 sprites
summary: Various outlets publish tutorials to locate the different hidden sprites in the Fortnite map, including the Grim Reaper, the Boss, and others.

title: Marvel's Wolverine will include a disc, unlike GTA 6
summary: Insomniac Games confirms that Marvel's Wolverine will have a physical edition with a disc, contrasting with Rockstar's decision to launch GTA 6 without a disc.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender season 2 improves, according to critics
summary: Both Polygon and 3DJuegos agree that season 2 of the Netflix live-action series surpasses the previous one, albeit with some reservations.

title: Demon Slayer: The Hinokami Chronicles 2 announced for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The Kimetsu no Yaiba action game will arrive on Switch 2 in October, according to announcements from Nintendo Life and Gematsu.

title: The Drifter receives good reviews on its launch for Switch 2
summary: The dark pulp horror game The Drifter is praised for its quality, comparable to the great classic graphic adventures.

title: Tim Sweeney criticizes Steam's AI requirements and talks about the future of games
summary: The CEO of Epic Games calls Valve's AI rules irresponsible, and in another interview discusses monopolies and the future of the industry.

title: Enshrouded announces official release date for October 2026
summary: The survival action game Enshrouded will arrive on PS5 and PC on October 15, while the Xbox Series version is expected in spring 2027.
